name: Cheddar Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shredded cheese and flour until the cheese is well coated.
2. In a fondue pot, heat milk and grated onion to not quite boiling.
3. Stir in the cheese mixture a little at a time, continuing to heat and stir until all the cheese is melted.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, Cayenne, and salt to taste.
5. Keep hot over an alcohol burner.
6. Serve with French bread cubes.
